title: Anyway to default time to 24 hour clock in new date picker for date column?
excerpt: Does anybody know if there is anyway to default time to 24 hour clock in new date picker for date column?

posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anybody know if there is anyway to default time to 24 hour clock in new date picker for date column?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Patrick,

You should be able to adjust the settings via your profile settings, under the language + region tab:

Screen Shot 2023-11-06 at 3.25.23 pm1572×690 31.7 KB

Let me know if this changes anything!
